online.title: TUG OF WAR
online.subtitle: Choose a Matchup
online.emptySuggestions: No suggestions yet. Be the first!

alerts.missingInfoMessage: You must fill in both sides.

onboarding.step1Text: This is the heart of TugUp! Pick the world's biggest rivalries (Galatasaray vs Fenerbahce, Android vs iOS...) and pull the rope for your side to boost the score.
onboarding.step2Text: Choose a matchup and tap the button matching your side's color to pull the rope. Each vote shifts the rope toward that side. Don't forget—the other side is voting too!
onboarding.step3Text: After each vote, a short cooldown starts. Watch a rewarded ad to skip the wait and vote again.
onboarding.step4Text: Every Monday, all scores reset. The side with the most votes that week wins and earns a cumulative victory point.

oneVsOne.title: 1v1
oneVsOne.modeSelectTitle: How Do You Want to Play?
oneVsOne.modeSelectSubtitle: Find a random opponent or invite a friend
oneVsOne.randomMatchDesc: Get matched instantly with an online player
oneVsOne.inviteFriendDesc: Share a link and let your friend join
oneVsOne.nameSubtitleInvite: Enter your name to share the invite link
oneVsOne.nameSubtitleRandom: Enter your name before joining the match
oneVsOne.waitingInviteFooter: The game starts when your friend opens the link. Stay on this screen!
oneVsOne.waitingMatchFooter: Searching for a match… Stay on this screen!
oneVsOne.loseMessage: {{opponent}} won this match. Come back stronger next time!

onboarding.step1Text: Match with another player and pull the rope head-to-head! Two characters, one rope, one goal: drag your opponent to your side.
onboarding.step2Text: Tap the button at the bottom quickly. Each tap moves the rope toward your side. But watch out—your opponent is doing the same!
onboarding.step3Text: You need to pull the rope from the center line all the way to the other side. Watch the progress bar—can you beat your opponent?
onboarding.step4Text: After you enter your name, the game automatically matches you with an opponent. Wait on this screen until they arrive. Ready? Let's go!

friends.title: Friends
friends.emptyText: Share the invite link via WhatsApp or another app. Anyone who opens it becomes your friend automatically.

game.title: 1v1 Invite
game.subtitle: Your friend invited you to a tug-of-war match!

quickGame.title: ⚡ Quick Game
quickGame.subtitle: Pick a level and start pulling!
quickGame.jokerFullMessage: Both jokers are already at the maximum limit (3).
quickGame.jokerEarnSubtitle: Which joker do you want to add?
quickGame.loseSubtitle: {{name}} didn't make it to the line.
quickGame.newRecordLastSecond: 🥇 NEW RECORD! Finished in the last second!

tutorial.title: Welcome to Quick Game!
tutorial.step1: Pick a level and tap the <bold>“PULL!”</bold> button quickly to drag the object to your side.
tutorial.step2: Reach your line before time runs out. The more time left when you win, the better your record!
tutorial.step3: When you pull, a force pushes the object back. Every 3-5 seconds it can snap back 10 units!
tutorial.step4: Use jokers for an edge: add <time>⏳ +2 s</time> or move <bomb>💥 +25%</bomb> toward your side. Watch ads to earn jokers.
tutorial.step5: Beat each level to unlock the next. 15 different objects are waiting for you!

game.dailyLimitMessage: You've used all 3 video rewards today. Try again tomorrow!
